title: Birding
summary: Take or upload a selfie and the page draws a little pixel bird based on your face. It all runs in your browser.
intro:
I've gotten into birding lately, so here's a fun version of it. Take or upload a selfie and the page turns you into a pixel bird. If you have wide eyes, your bird gets wide eyes; a rounder face gives a rounder bird, and your colors become its feathers.
Your photo stays on your device. Nothing is uploaded.
